transactions.desc: Hernandez was promoted to High-A Greensboro on Sunday, Colin Beazley of the Pittsburgh Post-Gazette reports.
Encarnacion elected free agency Sunday, Alex Pavlovic of NBC Sports Bay Area reports.
The Tigers selected Workman's contract from Triple-A Toledo on Sunday.
The Mets outrighted Wagaman to Triple-A Syracuse on Sunday.
The Mets reinstated Gerber (finger) from the 15-day injured list and optioned him to Triple-A Syracuse on Sunday.
The Dodgers selected Mills' contract from Triple-A Oklahoma City on Sunday.
The Dodgers optioned Gervase to Triple-A Oklahoma City on Sunday.
The Orioles claimed Roa off waivers from the Twins on Sunday and optioned him to Triple-A Norfolk, Jake Rill of MLB.com reports.
The Phillies claimed Rutledge off waivers and optioned him to Triple-A Lehigh Valley on Sunday.
The Giants optioned Santos to Triple-A Sacramento on Sunday.
The Giants recalled Smith from Triple-A Sacramento on Sunday.
The Giants reinstated Hentges (knee/shoulder) from the 15-day injured list Sunday.
The Giants optioned Walker to Triple-A Sacramento on Sunday, Alex Pavlovic of NBC Sports Bay Area reports.
The Twins recalled Rojas from Triple-A St. Paul on Sunday.
The Twins optioned Funderburk to Triple-A St. Paul on Sunday.
The Orioles recalled Espada from Triple-A Norfolk on Sunday.
The Orioles designated Trivino for assignment Sunday.
The Yankees reinstated Rodon (elbow) from the 15-day injured list to start Sunday's game against the Brewers.
The Yankees optioned Castro to Triple-A Scranton/Wilkes-Barre.
The Guardians acquired Bailey from the Giants on Saturday in exchange for left-hander Matt Wilkinson and the 29th pick in the 2026 First-Year Player Draft, Jeff Passan of ESPN.com reports.
The Dodgers reinstated Snell (shoulder) from the injured list Saturday.
San Francisco recalled McDonald from Triple-A Sacramento on Saturday.
The Rockies recalled Halvorsen from Triple-A Albuquerque on Saturday.
The Dodgers claimed Barnes off waivers from the Cubs on Saturday.
The Red Sox optioned Anderson to Triple-A Worcester on Saturday, Ari Alexander of 7 News Boston reports.
The Red Sox reinstated Slaten (oblique) from the injured list Saturday, Ari Alexander of 7 News Boston reports.
The Astros claimed Thomas off waivers from the Mariners on Saturday and optioned him to Triple-A Sugar Land.
The Rays designated Malloy for assignment Saturday.
The Rays optioned Englert to Triple-A Durham on Saturday.
The Rays selected Brooks' contract from Triple-A Durham on Saturday.
